SessionStart.command: gh auth status --hostname github.com 2>/dev/null && echo '✅ GitHub: authenticated' || echo '⚠️  GitHub: not authenticated — run: gh auth login'
command -v npx >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo '✅ npx: available' || echo '⚠️  npx: not found — install Node.js for Prometheus/PagerDuty/Slack MCP servers'

if [ -n "$PROMETHEUS_URL" ]; then curl -sf "${PROMETHEUS_URL}/-/ready" >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo '✅ Prometheus: reachable' || echo '⚠️  Prometheus: configured but unreachable'; else echo 'ℹ️  Prometheus: not configured (set PROMETHEUS_URL to enable)'; fi
